mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FILE_META (FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY) VALUES ( #{fileId}, #{originalName}, #{storedPath}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{uploadedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT, DELETED FROM FILE_META WHERE FILE_ID = #{fileId} AND DELETED = FALSE
SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT, DELETED FROM FILE_META WHERE DELETED = FALSE ORDER BY UPLOADED_AT DESC

SELECT FILE_ID, ORIGINAL_NAME, STORED_PATH, CONTENT_TYPE, SIZE_BYTES, UPLOADED_BY, UPLOADED_AT, DELETED FROM FILE_META WHERE DELETED = FALSE AND FILE_ID IN
#{id}
